title: Mexican Crumble Cheese Bake
description: A simple Mexican-inspired casserole with a crunchy crumble topping.
instructions: Thaw the flaky pastry sheet according to package instructions.
In a medium bowl, mix the Mexican cheese blend and cheddar cheese.
Sprinkle the cheese mixture evenly over the center of the pastry sheet, leaving a 1-inch border around the edges.
Fold the 1-inch border over the cheese mixture to form a crust.
In a small bowl, mix the melted butter, flour, paprika, cayenne pepper, and salt.
Sprinkle the crumble topping mixture evenly over the pastry crust.
Bake the casserole for 25-30 minutes, or until the crust is golden brown and the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove the casserole from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before slicing and serving.
